Calendar

Upcoming meetings, events, and important dates by campus.

PTA meetings, school events, and important dates — organized by campus.

Middle School

Middle School May 28, 2025

Spring Book Fair

Middle school library

Shop for books and support classroom libraries. Volunteers needed for setup and checkout.

Middle School June 5, 2025

8th Grade Celebration

Middle school gym

Honoring our graduating eighth graders before they head to high school.

High School

High School June 12, 2025

Family Fun Night

High school stadium

Games, food, and community fun for all ages. Bring the whole family.

High School September 10, 2025

First PTA meeting of the year

High school library

Meet other parents, hear from administrators, and help plan the year ahead.

Both campuses

August 28, 2025

Back-to-school welcome social

District campus green

Kick off the year together — meet PTA leaders from middle and high school in one place.

Serving Frazer Middle School and Frazer High School. Maintained by parent volunteers.
